event: I joined the IEEE RAS SMU SBC.
I received the "Rising Star" award from the IEEE RAS SMU SBC.
I joined the Medtech ERA robotica arm project as a member of the electrical team.
I was in the OC of Techrevive 1.0 (electronics reuse makeathon hosted by IEEE RAS SMU SBC) as a trainer.
We exhibited our project at the 10th edition of SMU career fair .
We the 2nd place among the top 3 projects for sophomore Computer Systems Engineering students during SMU project day.
Started my first internship at Medtech on Medtech ERA robotica arm project.
I joined the IEEE IAS SMU SBC.
I received the "Best Member" award from the IEEE RAS SMU SBC.
I was in the OC of Techrevive 2.0 (electronics reuse makeathon hosted by IEEE RAS SMU SBC) as a trainer.
I was in the Logistics Committee of Robogenesis 1.0 (robotics hackathon hosted by IEEE RAS SMU SBC and IEEE RAS FST SBC).
We the 2nd place among the top 3 projects for junior Computer Systems Engineering students during SMU project day.
I got elected as a training manager of IEEE RAS SMU SBC for 2026 mandate.
I received the "Rising Star" award from the IEEE IAS SMU SBC.
I got elected as a vice-chair of IEEE RAS SMU SBC for 2026 mandate.
